outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources maintained 10 active drilling sites as of mid-July 2022, all of which were continuously active with no new sites initiated, resulting in a stable but unsurging operational footprint. The relative activity delta of +2.2 indicates moderately elevated drilling intensity compared to recent history, supporting steady production in the final quarter before the target date. With full exposure to the Permian segment and a realized price differential near 92% of the elevated WTI average (~$88.50), revenue is underpinned by strong hydrocarbon prices. The deterministic revenue forecast is set at approximately $804.2 million for the quarter ending June 30, 2022.
